appDescription.message: A distraction-free tool that helps ADHD minds identify and focus on their most impactful daily tasks through signal-to-noise prioritization.
appDescription.description: Extension description for Chrome Web Store

priorityPlaceholder.message: mark your priority signals to see them here
priorityPlaceholder.description: Placeholder when no signals are marked

ratioGoalReached.message: you've reached the signal ratio goal.
ratioGoalReached.description: Status when signal count reaches ratio

signalInputPlaceholder.message: capture your thoughts, tasks, and priorities...

emptyStateMessage.message: no signals yet. start by capturing what matters today.

maxSignalsAlert.message: Maximum $COUNT$ signals allowed. Please delete a signal before adding a new one.

maxPriorityAlert.message: Maximum $COUNT$ priority signals allowed. Please unmark a signal first.
maxPriorityAlert.description: Alert when max priority signals reached
